# Competitive Landscape

## Direct Competitors

### 1. Teladoc Health (Enterprise Division)
- **Focus:** Large health system partnerships, direct-to-consumer
- **Weakness:** Does not serve small rural clinics; minimum contract $500K/year
- **Threat Level:** Medium (different market segment)

### 2. MDLive (Evernorth)
- **Focus:** Insurance-backed virtual visits, consumer-facing
- **Weakness:** No B2B provider-to-specialist matching; consumer-only model
- **Threat Level:** Low (different business model)

### 3. RubiconMD
- **Focus:** eConsults (asynchronous specialist opinions for PCPs)
- **Weakness:** Async only, no real-time video consultations; limited specialist network
- **Threat Level:** High (closest to our model, but async-only)

## Competitive Advantage

HealthBridge differentiates through: (1) real-time video + async hybrid model, (2) rural-first pricing (per-consultation, no annual minimums), (3) specialist network curated for rural-relevant specialties (cardiology, endocrinology, psychiatry).
